name: Spicy Buckwheat Noodles and Pork in Broth
recipeIngredient: 3 cups chicken stock, in a soup pot on the stove
3 dried red chili pods, seeded and julienned
1/2 cup very thinly sliced shiitake caps
recipeInstructions:
1. Have a pot of boiling water on the stove.
2. Place the buckwheat noodles into the boiling water and cook for about 4 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, season the pork with the salt and ground Szechuan peppercorns.
4. Heat oil in a saute pan and sear the pork tenderloin on all sides for 8 minutes, making sure to get a nice crust on the outside.
5. Remove the pork and let it cool slightly.
6. Drain the noodles, then add them to the hot chicken stock.
7. Add the chili peppers, shiitake caps, and mushroom soy sauce. Continue to simmer.
8. Thinly slice the pork tenderloin and add it along with the cilantro to the noodle broth.
9. Season as desired and ladle into a bowl.
10. Yield: 6 servings
